title: Topic catalogue (IA spine)
description: The hand-authored taxonomy that powers yen-gov's Topic Front Door (`/t`, `/t/:topic`) and the section list inside each state hub (`/s/:state`). Topic membership of an artifact is declared HERE, not on the artifact itself — keeping `indicator.schema.json` free of IA leakage (per ADR-0022). Each topic carries its Seventh Schedule list (`state` / `union` / `concurrent` / `na`) so cross-state surfaces can render the constitutional honesty banner without per-renderer logic. Each topic points to one or more artifacts via a polymorphic `kind`+`id` reference; the renderer dispatches on `kind` so election artifacts (different schema family) coexist with indicator artifacts under the same catalogue.

x-changelog.description: Initial schema. Created for the IA reset (TODO/IA-RESET-PLACE-FIRST-WITH-TOPIC-FRONT-DOOR.md, ADR-0022). Powers state-hub section nav + the Topic Front Door routes. Polymorphic artifact references via `kind` so election artifacts (result.summary.schema.json) and indicator artifacts (indicator.schema.json) live side by side without forcing a unified data shape.

sources.description: Per CLAUDE.md §12 / ADR-0002. Topic catalogue is hand-authored taxonomy, so the canonical shape is an empty array. The commit message records the rationale and any reference materials consulted.

topics.description: Ordered list of topics. Order is the default rendering order on the `/t` index and inside each state hub. Re-ordering is a deliberate editorial act (commit it).

id.description: URL slug. Single-segment for top-level topics (`fiscal`, `elections`, `energy`). Slash-segmented allowed for sub-topics (`fiscal/transfers`).

title.description: Human display name. Shown in topnav, breadcrumb, page header. NOT a code (the catalogue user is the citizen, not the data file).

list.description: Constitutional location per the Seventh Schedule. `state` = State List subjects (police, agriculture, public health). `union` = Union List (defence, railways, foreign affairs, GST policy). `concurrent` = Concurrent List (education, criminal law, economic planning). `na` = not a Seventh Schedule subject (process topics like elections, reference catalogues). Drives the mandatory list-badge on every topic header (ADR-0022) and the Union-list ranking banner.

summary.description: One-sentence plain-language explanation of what this topic covers. Shown under the topic title on `/t/:topic`.

icon.description: Lucide icon name (e.g. `landmark`, `vote`, `zap`, `users`). Optional; renderer falls back to a generic glyph.

featured.description: When true, this topic appears in the state-hub generic hero (top-N featured topics by catalogue order). UI/UX guardrail: the hero composes ONLY from featured topics rendered via existing IndicatorChoropleth thumbnails — no bespoke chrome.

peer_set_default.description: Default peer-set filter for cross-state ranked tables under this topic. For fiscal indicators the appropriate default is `general_category` (UT and special-category states appear in their own panels). Mirrors `state.schema.json` v3.3 `tier` enum minus the `all` superset.

artifacts.description: Polymorphic references to the data artifacts this topic exposes. The renderer dispatches on `kind`. Order is the in-topic rendering order; `default: true` marks the artifact shown on `/t/:topic` before any user picks one.

kind.description: Which artifact family. `indicator` → indicator.schema.json; `election` → result.summary.schema.json + result.constituency.schema.json; `feature_collection` → GeoJSON+metadata for spatial-only datasets (no v1 consumers yet, reserved for Phase 7+).

id.description: For `indicator`: the indicator's `id` from its artifact (e.g. `fiscal/outstanding_debt_pct_gsdp`). For `election`: the ECI event code (e.g. `AcGenMay2026`). For `feature_collection`: TBD.

display.description: Override display string for citizen-facing chrome. Mandatory when the underlying `id` is a code (e.g. `AcGenMay2026` → `Tamil Nadu Assembly · May 2026`).

default.description: When true, this artifact opens by default on `/t/:topic`. At most one artifact per topic SHOULD be marked default; ties are broken by array order.

featured.description: When true AND the parent topic has `featured: true`, this artifact is eligible for the state-hub generic hero.

scope.description: Geographic scope of this artifact's primary view. Drives which routes can host it: national-scope artifacts render on `/t/:topic`; state-scope artifacts render inside `/s/:state`; constituency-scope on `/s/:state/ac/:ac`. Defaults to `national` for indicators, `state` for elections.

notes.description: Editorial caveats specific to this topic. Optional. Shown below the summary on `/t/:topic`.
